## Checklist

- [ ] I edited only `papers.yml` (not `index.html` — that is auto-generated)
- [ ] All `link:` fields point to arXiv or another open-access URL (no paywalls)
- [ ] The paper is peer-reviewed or widely cited in its field
- [ ] I filled in `tldr`, `why`, `key_takeaway`, and `prerequisites` fields
- [ ] `level` is set correctly for the roadmap
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_papers.py` locally and it passed (optional but helpful)
